title: Zettai RPG
description: RPG mod adding 4 stats : Vitality, Strenght, Agility, Intelligence, and more to bring you more RPG experience!
body:
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RDRDu7ji/images/c8bc3bc2d4627dcc260f65b82e6f64e23670dd24.png)
### This simple mod introduces four main stats: **Vitality**, **Strength**, **Agility** and **Intelligence**.
### And, one additional - **Mining skill**.
### 
You can upgrade them accordingly: **Vitality** by _taking damage_, **Strength** by _dealing physical damage_, **Agility** by _running_, **Intelligence** by _dealing magic damage_.
And, **Mining**, well... by... **MINING** xD

![Stats ... ehh Status?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RDRDu7ji/images/066e42a46fc378748a2c6495f3a0851f689eae28.png)
- **Vitality** increases your _maximal health_.
- **Strength** increases your _physical damage_.
- **Agility** increases your _jump strength_ and _running/swimming_ capabilities.
- **Intelligence** increases your _magical damage_.
- **Mining skill** increases your _mining speed_.
To see your progress press **P** (can be changed in control settings).

No annoying pop-ups, simple stats progression.
Simple mod.
Maybe in future will add chat notifications about your progress.

Mod can be configured in config file.
It also has two commands:

```
/setStat
```
 and 
```
/addStat
```


Capability system is taken and changed from [Electroblob's Wizardry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/electroblobs-wizardry) mod.
